description: A physician is ordering a new medication, and the Clinical Decision Support system fires an alert for a potential major drug-drug interaction.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the alert that has appeared on the screen during order entry.

expected_outcome.value: Physician sees and acknowledges the critical alert.

nodes.task_description: Review the details of the interacting medications and the potential adverse effect.

expected_outcome.value: Physician understands the clinical risk presented by the alert.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the new medication order and select an alternative medication that does not have the interaction.

expected_outcome.value: Physician makes a different, safer clinical choice based on the CDS alert.
